response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two songs from on-screen text: 'Amazing Happy Halloween Night' by OSTER project (implied) or syudou (searched) and 'Nekuro no Hanayome' by Kanon69.
2. Search strings used: 
   - '"Amazing Happy Halloween Night" Japanese and English lyrics'
   - '"nekuro no hanayome" Japanese and English lyrics'
3. Found lyric sites for both, including Lyrical Nonsense and AnimeLyrics.com.
4. Used the identified performers (Shirakami Fubuki, and the FuwaMoco duo) based on visual recognition and common VTuber concert content.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of two songs in a Halloween-themed concert setting. The first song, 'Amazing Happy Halloween Night', is performed by three characters (identified as Bau Bau / Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, and Shirakami Fubuki). The second song, 'Nekuro no Hanayome' (The Bride of Necro), is performed solo by Shirakami Fubuki. Both songs are in Japanese.

scenes.description: Three characters perform the song 'Amazing Happy Halloween Night'. The song title and 'OSTER project' are credited in the lower third at the start of the song.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirakami Fubuki, Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
気づけば見知らぬ世界に立っていた
何処かも分からず毎日毎日毎日泣いていた
なんて暇もなく Happy Time!
おかしな面々が Happy Time!
ようこそ everyone
ノリ気もいらない this spooky night
ハラの底まで
左 kick & bass & hats & trumpet
ランタンと swingin' beat
赤い靴で踊り狂えば
浮世の憂いも忘れられるでしょ
...and so on. (Partial lyrics found; full lyrics are extensive).
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If I noticed, I was standing in an unknown world
Without knowing where I was, I was crying every day, every day, every day
I don't even have time for that, Happy Time!
Strange people are having a Happy Time!
Welcome, everyone!
If you're not in the mood, it's a spooky night!
From the bottom of my stomach,
Left kick & bass & hats & trumpet
London and swingin' beat
If you go crazy dancing in red shoes,
You'll be able to forget the worries of this world, right?
...and so on. (Partial lyrics found; full lyrics are extensive).

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki performs the song 'Nekuro no Hanayome'. The song title and 'Kanon69' are credited in the lower third at the start of the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
物言わぬ唇に生気を吹き込んで、
今宵「あなた」は甦る
あの頃の姿で。
...and so on. (Partial lyrics found; full lyrics are extensive).
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Blowing life into the lips that don't speak,
Tonight, you will awaken
To the appearance of those days.
...and so on. (Partial lyrics found; full lyrics are extensive).
